findings: Peak power = 416.19W at 100pct util — highest FP16 on A100
Peak SM clock during heavy load = 1185 MHz
After compute power drops to 87.39W with 1999 MB loaded and 0pct util
Post-clear SM clock = 1155 MHz — never returns to 210 MHz
300 second ghost monitoring confirms SM stuck at 1155 MHz

security_issues.description: 463 MB of 16384x16384 FP16 tensor data remains. 300 second monitoring confirms permanent until pod restart.

conclusion: 416W peak highest FP16 power on A100. Ghost state 2 persistent 300s. 463 MB permanent until pod restart.
